query: How do the Spirit observations support the idea that fumarolic activity and hot spring activity both occurred in the same volcanic hydrothermal system?

row.paper: Ruff, S.W., et al., 2020. The case for ancient hot springs in Gusev crater, Mars. Astrobiology, 20(4), pp.475-499. DOI:10.1089/ast.2019.2044
